title: Re-Cognition
description: A pen, a sketchbook, and no plan. The rest just showed up.
longDescription:
This one started with a pen, a sketchbook, and absolutely no plan.

No reference, no sketch, no destination. Just a line that needed somewhere to go and a willingness to follow it, or sometimes drift off course. One thing became another thing, which became something else entirely, which ended here.

Some items showed up on purpose. Most of them just arrived.

Re-Cognition is what happens when you stop deciding and start wandering. Look at it once and see chaos. Look again and maybe find something looking back.
